claimText: UC Berkeley prohibits entering FERPA-protected student records, non-public instructional materials, and proprietary or unpublished research into generative AI tools.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Such information includes: Student records subject to FERPA; Non-public instructional materials; Proprietary or unpublished research.

citation.citationTitle: Appropriate Use of Generative AI Tools | Office of Ethics, Risk, and Compliance Services
